channel.title: About on Alix Pham
channel.description: Recent content in About on Alix Pham

item.title: About me
item.description: Originally from Toulouse, France, I currently live in Geneva, Switzerland. I design programs, convenings, and experimental formats for impact-focused communities — currently as Programs & Initiatives Lead at Effective Altruism France, and through freelance and grant-funded work with various communities, e.g. biosecurity professionals. With a background in biomedical engineering, I have worked across biosecurity, AI governance, and community building, previously at the Simon Institute for Longterm Governance (via the Talos Fellowship) and as Co-Director of Effective Altruism Switzerland.
